notes: fixture session: deep plugin-host fail — vtable-recovery Phase 3 indirect call tracing recovered callback table layout, sandbox escape blocked by seccomp

vtable-recovery Phase 3 traced 12 indirect calls from the host controller dispatch loop, identifying 4 vtable groups. The callback table at .data.rel.ro+0x2a00 has 8 slots, slot 3 at +0x18 dispatches to the plugin cleanup handler. The allocator corruption redirects slot 3 to a controlled address. Sandbox escape remains blocked by seccomp on execve family — the callback executes inside the sandbox.
